events.name: St. John's Red Storm at Providence Friars

headlines.description: — Dylan Darling had 23 points and eight rebounds and No. 17 St. John's scored eight straight points after a fracas that resulted in six ejections to take the lead and earn its 11th straight victory, a 79-69 win over Providence on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: No. 17 St. John's survives Providence push to win 11th straight, 79-69 over Friars
